body.title: D-igor-single-ticket-cert-mode-2026-04-29
body.text:
# Decision rollup — D-igor-single-ticket-cert-mode-2026-04-29

**Closed at:** 2026-04-30T01:58:28.661243+00:00
**Ticket count:** 2 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-igor-single-ticket-mode (S) — IGOR_SINGLE_TICKET env var — restrict pe_chain to one named ticket during cert  `done` — _enforce_single_ticket_mode in pe_entry_init reads IGOR_SINGLE_TICKET env var. Set → only that ticket passes ENTRY; unset/empty → normal autonomous pickup. 10 tests, 4203 regression pass. TODO comment
- T-flip-igor-worker-tickets-during-cert (S) — Mass-flip pending igor-worker tickets to claude during cert (belt-and-suspenders)  `done` — cert_worker_freeze.py — --freeze/--unfreeze/--status modes; metadata.original_worker preserves restoration; idempotent. Live freeze ran on 2 igor-worker tickets (T-wire-graph-preparse-pipeline, T-wg-c

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
